name: canadian-finance-planner
description: A comprehensive personal finance planning skill for Canadians. Conducts financial interviews, builds budgets and action plans, generates interactive dashboards, and provides ongoing coaching — all tailored to Canadian tax rules, registered accounts (RRSP, TFSA, RESP, FHSA), government benefits (CCB, CESG, CPP, OAS), and provincial variations.

plugins.name: financial-planner
plugins.description: Canadian Personal Finance Manager — financial interviews, budget planning, interactive dashboards, and ongoing coaching for Canadians
